summary: Frontend testing completed for Latence poetic journaling app. Tested theme toggle, astrology page tabs, mood selection, and navigation flows. All core features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid='theme-toggle' not rendered in web version of React Native - had to use mouse coordinates for testing

action_items: Consider adding web-compatible data-testid attributes for TouchableOpacity elements
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext.tsx: Well-structured theme system with 3 modes (light, dark, silence) - good implementation
Astrology page: Contains comprehensive data for Celtic trees (13), Arabic mansions (28), and Western houses (12) - all working
Mood selection: All 12 emotional states properly displayed with icons
Tab navigation uses data-testid attributes but may need verification on web platform
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is React Native/Expo web. Theme toggle works via coordinates (x:1820, y:46 on desktop). All astrology tabs work via text selectors. Mood selection requires going through auth -> guest flow first.

theme_toggle.details: Successfully cycles through light -> dark -> silence -> light. Icon changes appropriately (moon -> eye -> sun).

astrology_page_lune.details: Shows current moon phase 'Premier Croissant' (Day 7), displays all 8 lunar phases with explanations

astrology_page_celtique.details: Displays all 13 Celtic trees with Ogham symbols, dates, and descriptions

astrology_page_arabe.details: Shows current Arabic mansion with Arabic script, displays all 28 Manzil with descriptions

astrology_page_maisons.details: Displays all 12 astrological houses with names, themes, and descriptions

navigation_home_to_astrology.details: Clicking 'Astres' menu item successfully navigates from /home to /astrology

mood_selection.details: All 12 emotional states displayed (Serein, Joyeux, Rêveur, Mélancolique, Fatigué, Inspiré, Anxieux, Nostalgique, Perdu, Reconnaissant, Contemplatif, Éveillé) with appropriate icons

energy_selection.details: 5-level energy scale works, labels 'Épuisé' to 'Plein d'énergie' visible

wisdom_screen.details: Sacred text/proverb displayed after mood+energy selection

onboarding_flow.details: Complete flow: Auth -> Mood -> Energy -> Wisdom -> Home works correctly
